content.summary: this is cool!!! Claude (@claudeai) New in Claude Code: auto mode. Instead of approving every file write and bash command, or skipping permissions entirely, auto mode lets Claude make permission decisions on your behalf. Safeguards check each action before it runs. Video — https://nitter.net/claudeai/status/2036503582166393240#m

Post title: this is cool!!!

Post summary: this is cool!!! Claude (@claudeai) New in Claude Code: auto mode. Instead of approving every file write and bash command, or skipping permissions entirely, auto mode lets Claude make permission decisions on your behalf. Safeguards check each action before it runs. Video — https://nitter.net/claudeai/status/2036503582166393240#m

Canonical URL: https://x.com/danshipper/status/2036503833497436173
